title: cerastium alpinum var. lanatum
intro: Cerastium alpinum var. lanatum, commonly known as Alpine Mouse-ear or Woolly Mouse-ear, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cerastium alpinum var. lanatum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and other health problems.
